creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: az
Date: Tue Jan 15 10:03:30 2013
New Revision: 310431
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/310431

Log:
  - update to 3.2.2
  
  PR:		ports/175309
  Submitted by:	trociny@

Modified:
  head/devel/zmq-devel/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/zmq-devel/distinfo   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/devel/zmq-devel/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/zmq-devel/Makefile	Tue Jan 15 09:36:35 2013	(r310430)
+++ head/devel/zmq-devel/Makefile	Tue Jan 15 10:03:30 2013	(r310431)
@@ -6,16 +6,15 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	zmq
-PORTVERSION=	3.1.0
+PORTVERSION=	3.2.2
 CATEGORIES=	devel net
 MASTER_SITES=	http://download.zeromq.org/
 PKGNAMESUFFIX=	-devel
-DISTNAME=	zeromq-${DISTVERSION}-beta
+DISTNAME=	zeromq-${DISTVERSION}
 
 MAINTAINER=	az@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Open source message queue optimised for performance
 
-WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${DISTNAME:S/-beta//}
 MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=	yes
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 USE_GNOME=	gnomehack
@@ -61,4 +60,10 @@ MAN3=	\
 regression-test:
 	cd ${WRKSRC} && ${MAKE} check
 
-.include <bsd.port.mk>
+.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
+
+.if defined(CC) && ${CC:T:M*clang*} == "clang" || ${OSVERSION} >= 1000024
+CONFIGURE_ENV+=	CXXFLAGS=-Wno-mismatched-tags
+.endif
+
+.include <bsd.port.post.mk>

Modified: head/devel/zmq-devel/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/zmq-devel/distinfo	Tue Jan 15 09:36:35 2013	(r310430)
+++ head/devel/zmq-devel/distinfo	Tue Jan 15 10:03:30 2013	(r310431)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (zeromq-3.1.0-beta.tar.gz) = f6d4d81ab73a870907fb8b205a44ce24e4c32de56e2a8479eb6c2fcb7aa8578f
-SIZE (zeromq-3.1.0-beta.tar.gz) = 1865154
+SHA256 (zeromq-3.2.2.tar.gz) = 2b4eeda60fe47a9fa0804d53d76f656665c5f84dab7e63a1d496d9430b554f99
+SIZE (zeromq-3.2.2.tar.gz) = 2067590
